title: Disk Full Blocks Writes

payload.log_text:
May 13 04:12:02 ubuntu-prod kernel: EXT4-fs warning: mounting fs with errors
May 13 04:12:05 ubuntu-prod app[4410]: OSError: [Errno 28] No space left on device: '/var/log/app/events.log'
May 13 04:12:07 ubuntu-prod postgres[881]: could not write to file "pg_wal/xlogtemp": No space left on device
May 13 04:12:09 ubuntu-prod systemd-journald[311]: Failed to write entry, ignoring: No space left on device

chat_prompt: Summarize the disk-full incident and suggest what to clean first.
